user.title: Day Phase Tracker
user.description: Create a named day-phase tracker instance.

phase_count.title: Number of phases
phase_count.description: How many phases do you want to define? (Minimum: 2, Maximum: 12)

phase.title: Phase {phase_num} of {phase_count}
phase.description: Define name, trigger type, direction and fallback time for this phase.

phase_custom.title: Custom elevation – Phase {phase_num} of {phase_count}
phase_custom.description: Enter the exact elevation threshold in degrees for "{phase_name}".

phase_entity.title: Entity trigger – Phase {phase_num} of {phase_count}: "{phase_name}"
phase_entity.description: Select any entity (e.g. binary_sensor.sun2_dawn). The phase is active when the entity matches the expected state.

phase_extra.title: Constraints – Phase {phase_num} of {phase_count}: "{phase_name}"
phase_extra.description: All fields are optional. Leave blank to skip. Lux is ignored for entity-based triggers.

data.time_max: Latest end time (HH:MM, empty = no limit)

master_menu.title: Master phases (optional)
master_menu.description: {group_count} master phase group(s) defined so far. Add groups to combine phases, or finish.

master_add.title: Add master phase group
master_add.description: Give the group a name and select which sub-phases belong to it.

error.duplicate_phase_name: This phase name is already used
error.min_phases: Please select at least one sub-phase

abort.already_configured: An instance with this name already exists

init.title: Day Phase Tracker — Edit
init.description: What would you like to change?

edit_settings.title: Global settings
edit_settings.description: Change the sun entity used as the primary elevation source.

phases_menu.title: Phases ({phase_count} defined)
phases_menu.description: Add, edit, remove or reorder phases.

phase_edit.title: Edit phase — select
phase_edit.description: Choose the phase you want to edit.

phase_remove.title: Remove phase
phase_remove.description: Select the phase to delete. It will also be removed from any master groups.

phase_reorder.title: Reorder phases
phase_reorder.description: Select all phases in the desired order (top = first evaluated).

opt_phase.title: {action} phase
opt_phase.description: Define name, trigger type, direction and fallback time.

opt_phase_custom.title: Custom elevation — "{phase_name}"
opt_phase_custom.description: Enter the exact elevation threshold in degrees.

opt_phase_entity.title: Entity trigger — "{phase_name}"
opt_phase_entity.description: Select any entity (e.g. binary_sensor.sun2_dawn). The phase is active when the entity matches the expected state.

opt_phase_extra.title: Constraints — "{phase_name}"
opt_phase_extra.description: All fields are optional. Leave blank to skip. Lux is ignored for entity-based triggers.

data.time_max: Latest end time (HH:MM, empty = no limit)

masters_menu.title: Master phase groups ({group_count} defined)
masters_menu.description: Add or remove master phase groups.

menu_options.master_edit_add: Add / replace a master phase group

master_edit_add.title: Add master phase group
master_edit_add.description: Give the group a name and select which sub-phases belong to it. If a group with the same name exists it will be replaced.

error.duplicate_phase_name: This phase name is already used
error.min_phases: Please select at least one sub-phase
